# CheckMyVibeCode
> The go-to community for AI-built projects. Developers showcase apps built with Claude, Cursor, Lovable, Bolt, v0 and other AI coding tools. Get upvotes, feedback and discover what others are building.

## Pages
- /: Project showcase — browse and upvote AI-built apps, tools, games and websites
- /checker: Vibe Code Checker — AI-powered code quality analysis for vibe-coded projects
- /forum: Community forum for vibe coders — questions, tips and discussions
- /leaderboard: Weekly top projects ranked by upvotes

## About
CheckMyVibeCode is a community platform where developers who build with AI tools can submit their projects, collect upvotes and feedback, and discover inspiring AI-built projects from other builders.
